ddls:
CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the distributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the distributor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the distributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distributor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the distributor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the customer's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the customer's location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person at the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_class" TEXT /* Class of the product (e.g., Mood Stabilizers, Antibiotics) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the product */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel of the sale (e.g., Hospital, Pharmacy) */,
  "sub_channel" TEXT /* Sub-channel of the sale (e.g., Private, Retail) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the sale */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sale */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date of the delivery */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., Pending, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "sales_rep_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales representative */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  "sales_team" TEXT /* Sales team the representative belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sales representative operates */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales representative record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reps_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
